name: medisync-workspace
description: Monolithic MediSync workspace with React frontend, Express API, and FastAPI automation service.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,PYTHON -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8001 --app-dir services/python"
scripts.start:all: npm run setup && npm run dev
